LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT MARK BROWN'S CLAIM OF EXEMPTION. MATTER WAS NOT ARGUED. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DENIED. MR. BROWN HAS NOT SHOWN THAT ANY OF THE MONIES HELD BY THE SHERIFF IS EXEMPT FROM EXECUTION BY PLAINTIFF AND JUDGMENT CREDITOR CITIBANK. COURT SHALL SIGN AND MAIL OUT A FORMAL ORDER TO PARTIES AND THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: SEAN KANE; REPORTER: MELANIE GHENO, CSR #7489

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Oct-05-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. BRANDON TANG, ESQ. Tel No. 510-896-9411 specially appearing for the Plaintiff;
Defendant MARK I. BROWN, Tel No. 415-218-1266 appearing in pro per.

RULING - Matter was not argued. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Defendant Mark Brown's claim of exemption is denied. Mr. Brown has not shown that any of the monies held by the Sheriff is exempt from execution by plaintiff and judgment creditor Citibank. Court shall sign and mail out a formal order to parties and the Sheriff's Office. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/HEK)
